chats.empty_body: Start a chat to translate your first message.
chats.delete_confirm_body: This permanently removes the chat and its messages. The original drafts are also gone.
chats.delete_warning_pending: There are unsaved local changes. Delete anyway?

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle_chat: Settings for this chat. Empty fields fall back to your defaults.
preferences.register_help: How formal the translation should be. Leave blank to infer from naturalness.
preferences.my_nickname_help: How you'd like to be referred to in this chat.
preferences.contact_name_tgt_help: Optional override for how their name appears in the target language.
preferences.notes_help: Anything that helps the translator — context, vocabulary, things to avoid.
preferences.concurrent_edit_banner: These preferences were updated on another device. Reload to see the latest.

compose_hint.did_you_mean: Did you mean {{suggested}}? ({{prior}} was their earlier name)

coachmarks.composer_first_translate: Tap Translate to see the literal and natural passes side by side.
coachmarks.audit_points_first: Every meaningful change shows up here. Accept, reject, or just read why.
coachmarks.view_toggle_first: Switch between source, target, or both — your preference per chat.
coachmarks.refine_first: Not quite right? Tell me what to change in plain language.

onboarding_app.sample_chat_banner: This is a sample chat to show you around. Archive it any time.
onboarding_app.fixture_message_1: Hey, can you let me know when you're free?
onboarding_app.fixture_message_2: Sure, I'm free on the weekend. What did you have in mind?
onboarding_app.fixture_message_3: Want to try a real chat?
